name: Elven Kissing
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: [AttackerName]'s tongue lovingly invades [TargetName]'s mouth, aggressively teasing [TargetHisOrHer] mouth as their tongues dance!
miss: [AttackerName] tongue lovingly invades [TargetName]'s mouth, aggressively teasing [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind fogs up from the intimacy! [TargetName] is charmed!
